title: centaurea pseudophrygia subsp. ratezatensis
intro: Centaurea pseudophrygia subsp. ratezatensis is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Romania, and is characterized by its compact growth habit and showy purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centaurea pseudophrygia subsp. ratezatensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, have been used to treat various conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory issues.
